text:
(Rule 34.22 provides for the transmission of documents to a court in a reciprocating country.)


Textual Amendments


F41 Words in rule 34.18 heading substituted (22.4.2014) by The Family Procedure (Amendment No.3) Rules 2013 (S.I. 2013/3204) , rules 1 , 115 (with rule 137 ); S.I. 2014/954 , art. 2


#### Notification of confirmation [ F42 , variation ] or revocation of a maintenance order by [ F43 the family court ] E+W


34.19. —(1) This rule applies where [ F44 the family court ] makes an order—


(2) The court officer must send written notice of the making, [ F47 variation, ] revocation or confirmation of the order, as appropriate, to the relevant court in the reciprocating country.


F48 (3) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . .


(Section 5 of the 1972 Act applies to a provisional order made by [ F49 the family court ] in accordance with section 3 of that Act which has been confirmed by a court in a reciprocating country.) F50 ...


Textual Amendments


F42 Word in rule 34.19 heading inserted (22.4.2014) by The Family Procedure (Amendment No.3) Rules 2013 (S.I. 2013/3204) , rules 1 , 116(a)(i) (with rule 137 ); S.I. 2014/954 , art. 2


F43 Words in rule 34.19 heading substituted (22.4.2014) by The Family Procedure (Amendment No.3) Rules 2013 (S.I. 2013/3204) , rules 1 , 116(a)(ii) (with rule 137 ); S.I. 2014/954 , art. 2

metadata.title: Part 34 — Reciprocal Enforcement of Maintenance Orders
